diagrams.title: RMSprop vs SGD Update Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows how SGD oscillates in steep directions while RMSprop smooths the path by normalizing gradient updates
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why RMSprop reduces oscillations and converges faster

diagrams.title: Adam Optimizer Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of Adam update process showing moment calculation, bias correction, and parameter update
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete Adam update pipeline

diagrams.title: Momentum Effect Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how momentum helps escape local minima by accumulating velocity in consistent gradient directions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding benefit of first moment in Adam

diagrams.title: Per-parameter Learning Rates
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how different parameters receive different effective learning rates based on their gradient history
diagrams.purpose: Understanding adaptive nature of RMSprop and Adam
